Class Simulator

java.lang.Object
simulation.services.Simulator
public class Simulator extends Object
Central controller of the forest-fire simulation.

Pure model class — no UI dependency. The JavaFX application drives this via a AnimationTimer and calls setOnRefresh(Consumer) to receive update notifications.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Simulator()
    Initialises with default settings and a random grid.

  • Constructor Details

    • Simulator

      public Simulator()
      Initialises with default settings and a random grid.

  • Method Details

    • setOnRefresh

      public void setOnRefresh(Consumer<Grid> callback)
      Sets a callback invoked after every grid update (step, ignite, load…). The JavaFX view registers here to redraw the canvas.
      Parameters:
      callback - consumer receiving the updated grid

    • prepareStart

      public void prepareStart()
      Records the initial snapshot the first time the simulation starts. Called by the JavaFX timer before the first step.

    • reset

      public void reset()
      Resets to initial state.

    • stepOnce

      public void stepOnce()
      Advances exactly one time step (step-by-step mode).

    • timeStep

      public void timeStep()
      Advances the simulation by one time step (double-buffered). Called by the JavaFX AnimationTimer every tick.

    • igniteCell

      public void igniteCell(int x, int y)
      Ignites the cell at (x, y) if possible.
      Parameters:
      x - column
      y - row

    • paintZone

      public void paintZone(int x1, int y1, int x2, int y2, TerrainType terrain)
      Paints a rectangular zone with the given terrain type.
      Parameters:
      x1 - top-left column
      y1 - top-left row
      x2 - bottom-right column
      y2 - bottom-right row
      terrain - terrain to apply

    • loadGrid

      public void loadGrid(Grid newGrid)
      Loads a new grid, resetting simulation state.
      Parameters:
      newGrid - grid to load

    • saveBinary

      public void saveBinary(String path) throws IOException
      Saves current state to a binary file.
      Parameters:
      path - output path
      Throws:
      IOException - on write failure

    • loadBinary

      public void loadBinary(String path) throws IOException
      Loads state from a binary file.
      Parameters:
      path - input path
      Throws:
      IOException - on read failure

    • computeStats

      public GridStats computeStats()
      Returns:
      live statistics for the current grid

    • getGrid

      public Grid getGrid()
      Returns:
      current grid

    • getStep

      public int getStep()
      Returns:
      current step

    • getWind

      public Wind getWind()
      Returns:
      current wind

    • getEnvironment

      public Environment getEnvironment()
      Returns:
      current environment

    • getSpeedMs

      public int getSpeedMs()
      Returns:
      simulation speed in ms

    • getHistory

      public List<SimulationSnapshot> getHistory()
      Returns:
      unmodifiable history

    • setAlgorithm

      public void setAlgorithm(SpreadAlgorithm algorithm)
      Parameters:
      algorithm - new spread algorithm

    • setSpeed

      public void setSpeed(int ms)
      Parameters:
      ms - new delay between steps

    • setWind

      public void setWind(Wind wind)
      Parameters:
      wind - new wind

    • setToroidal

      public void setToroidal(boolean toroidal)
      Parameters:
      toroidal - topology mode

    • applyEnvironment

      public void applyEnvironment()
      Re-applies the environment immediately to the current grid
